urdu transliteration text:
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
Sometimes from Najaf, sometimes from Karbala
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA

KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA SE MILTI HAI
Sometimes from Najaf, sometimes from Karbala we get (blessings)
KAHAA YEH KISNE TARAQI DUA SE MILTI HAI
english translation text: Who says success is achieved from Duas alone?

urdu transliteration text:
BARE AMEER HAI AISE FAQEER DUNYA ME
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: The beggars on this earth are wealthy…

urdu transliteration text:
KE JINKO BHEEK DAR E SAYADA SE MILTI HAI
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: Who have received blessings from the door of Sayyada (Bibi Fatima A.S)

urdu transliteration text:
HUME TO BAAGHE RISALAT KE PHOOL KI KHUSHBOO
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: We are able to smell the fragrance of the flowers from the garden of Prophethood

urdu transliteration text:
QASAM KHUDA KI HADITHE KISA SE MILTI HAI
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: By God, Whenever we recite Hadithe Kisa (story of the cloak)..

urdu transliteration text:
GALE LAGA KE JISSE BHAI KEH RAHE HAI HUSSAIN
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: The one who Imam Hussain (A.S) is embracing and calling brother…

urdu transliteration text:
YEH HUR NAHI HAI FANA HAI BAQA SE MILTI HAI
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: He is not Hur…He is someone who was perished when he met the one who is ever-living

urdu transliteration text:
NUSAIRI HAZRATE ABBAS SE MILA TO KAHA
When a Nusairi met Hazrat Abbas, he said…
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA

TUMHARI SHAKL HUMAARE KHUDA SE MILTI HAI
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: “Your face resembles that of our God”

urdu transliteration text:
ALI KE ISHQ ME REHAN IZZAT O SHOHRATGHAREEB KHANE PE KHUD MUJH SE AAKE MILTI HAI
KABHI NAJAF SE, KABHI KARBALA
english translation text: In the love of Ali, respect and reverence……come to me on their own
